meaning: Practical, specific, and clear enough to be put into practice or acted upon immediately.
definition: Providing clear information or guidance that can be acted upon immediately.
example: The consultant's report provided several actionable steps to reduce operational costs.
exampleHindi: सलाहकार की रिपोर्ट ने परिचालन लागत को कम करने के लिए कई कार्रवाई योग्य कदम प्रदान किए।

meaning: To bring different people, plans, or ideas into agreement, coordination, or cooperation.
definition: To agree on goals, plans, or directions with other team members.
example: We need to align our marketing goals with the overall business strategy for this year.
exampleHindi: हमें इस वर्ष के लिए अपने मार्केटिंग लक्ष्यों को समग्र व्यावसायिक रणनीति के साथ संरेखित करने की आवश्यकता है।

meaning: The activity of establishing connections, friendship, and understanding between different groups.
definition: The activity of establishing connections, friendship, and understanding between different groups.
example: The new manager focused on bridge building between the sales and technical support teams.
exampleHindi: नए प्रबंधक ने बिक्री और तकनीकी सहायता टीमों के बीच पुल निर्माण पर ध्यान केंद्रित किया।

meaning: To contribute something of value, such as a skill, unique idea, or resource, to a discussion or project.
definition: To contribute something of value, such as a skill, unique idea, or resource, to a discussion or project.
example: Each consultant brings a wealth of industry experience to the table.
exampleHindi: प्रत्येक सलाहकार मेज पर उद्योग का भरपूर अनुभव लेकर आता है।

meaning: Agreement, support, or approval for a policy, project, change, or idea from key stakeholders.
definition: Acceptance of and willingness to actively support and participate in something.
example: To implement the new software successfully, we need buy-in from the department heads.
exampleHindi: नए सॉफ़्टवेयर को सफलतापूर्वक लागू करने के लिए, हमें विभाग प्रमुखों से सहमति की आवश्यकता है।

meaning: A temporary alliance of different groups, parties, or departments for joint action or support.
definition: A temporary alliance of different political parties formed to run a government when no single party has a majority.
example: A coalition of employee representatives was formed to discuss benefits with the HR team.
exampleHindi: एचआर टीम के साथ लाभों पर चर्चा करने के लिए कर्मचारी प्रतिनिधियों का एक गठबंधन बनाया गया था।

meaning: The state of sticking together, uniting, or working effectively as a team.
definition: The way ideas and sentences in a piece of writing link together smoothly
example: Clear communication is the key to maintaining team cohesion during remote work.
exampleHindi: दूरस्थ कार्य के दौरान टीम में सामंजस्य बनाए रखने की कुंजी स्पष्ट संचार है।

meaning: The action of working together with one or more people or groups to produce or create something.
definition: The action of working with someone to produce or create something.
example: This research paper is the result of a close collaboration between two universities.
exampleHindi: यह शोध पत्र दो विश्वविद्यालयों के बीच घनिष्ठ सहयोग का परिणाम है।

meaning: A choice or agreement made by a group of people together, representing the views of all members.
definition: A choice or agreement made by a group of people together, representing the views of all members.
example: Choosing the new office location was a collective decision made by all employees.
exampleHindi: नए कार्यालय स्थान का चयन करना सभी कर्मचारियों द्वारा लिया गया सामूहिक निर्णय था।

meaning: A shared feature, interest, or belief that is common to all members of a group.
definition: A shared feature, interest, or belief that is common to all members of a group.
example: The common denominator among the team members is their dedication to quality coding.
exampleHindi: टीम के सदस्यों के बीच आम बात गुणवत्तापूर्ण कोडिंग के प्रति उनका समर्पण है।

meaning: An objective, target, or purpose that all members of a group are working together to achieve.
definition: An objective, target, or purpose that all members of a group are working together to achieve.
example: We must remember that despite our debates, we all share the common goal of customer satisfaction.
exampleHindi: हमें याद रखना चाहिए कि हमारी बहसों के बावजूद, हम सभी ग्राहक संतुष्टि के सामान्य लक्ष्य को साझा करते हैं।

meaning: To build a relationship of mutual understanding, trust, and smooth communication with someone.
definition: To build a friendly, trusting, and positive relationship with the audience.
example: It is important to establish rapport with the client before discussing contract renewals.
exampleHindi: अनुबंध नवीनीकरण पर चर्चा करने से पहले ग्राहक के साथ संबंध स्थापित करना महत्वपूर्ण है।

meaning: To ensure that everyone has the same understanding, expectations, or information about a situation.
definition: To ensure that everyone has the same understanding, expectations, or information about a situation.
example: Let's have a quick call to get on the same page before we meet with the client.
exampleHindi: आइए ग्राहक से मिलने से पहले उसी पेज पर आने के लिए एक त्वरित कॉल करें।

meaning: The way in which people in a group interact, communicate, build relationships, and work with each other.
definition: The way in which people in a group interact, communicate, build relationships, and work with each other.
example: A positive group dynamic is essential for creative brain-storming sessions.
exampleHindi: रचनात्मक विचार-मंथन सत्रों के लिए एक सकारात्मक समूह गतिशीलता आवश्यक है।

meaning: To bring different ideas, systems, rules, or departments into agreement so they work well together.
definition: To bring different ideas, systems, rules, or departments into agreement so they work well together.
example: The project manager worked to harmonize the schedules of the offshore and local teams.
exampleHindi: परियोजना प्रबंधक ने अपतटीय और स्थानीय टीमों के शेड्यूल में सामंजस्य स्थापित करने के लिए काम किया।

meaning: Working together in perfect agreement, coordination, or harmony.
definition: Working together in perfect agreement, coordination, or harmony.
example: The marketing and sales teams are in sync, resulting in a very successful product launch.
exampleHindi: मार्केटिंग और बिक्री टीमें तालमेल में हैं, जिसके परिणामस्वरूप एक बहुत ही सफल उत्पाद लॉन्च हुआ है।

meaning: To settle and resolve the final, small points or issues of an agreement or plan.
definition: To settle and resolve the final, small points or issues of an agreement or plan.
example: We have agreed on the price; now we just need to iron out the details of the delivery schedule.
exampleHindi: हम कीमत पर सहमत हो गए हैं; अब हमें केवल डिलीवरी शेड्यूल के विवरण को समझने की जरूरत है।

meaning: A business project or activity undertaken by two or more companies or parties working together.
definition: A business project or activity undertaken by two or more companies or parties working together.
example: The tech firm and the car manufacturer entered a joint venture to build self-driving vehicles.
exampleHindi: टेक फर्म और कार निर्माता ने सेल्फ-ड्राइविंग वाहन बनाने के लिए एक संयुक्त उद्यम में प्रवेश किया।

meaning: Agreeing with, supporting, or actively participating in a plan, project, or group.
definition: Agreeing with, supporting, or actively participating in a plan, project, or group.
example: Once the finance director is on board, we can start purchasing the new equipment.
exampleHindi: एक बार वित्त निदेशक के बोर्ड पर आने के बाद, हम नए उपकरण खरीदना शुरू कर सकते हैं।

meaning: To consult, discuss, and work with others to solve a problem or generate ideas.
definition: To consult, discuss, and work with others to solve a problem or generate ideas.
example: If we put our heads together, I am sure we can find a solution to this coding bug.
exampleHindi: यदि हम एक साथ मिलकर काम करें, तो मुझे यकीन है कि हम इस कोडिंग बग का समाधान ढूंढ सकते हैं।

meaning: To join together in support of a person, idea, decision, or cause.
definition: To join together in support of a person, idea, decision, or cause.
example: The entire team rallied around the new manager during the company restructuring.
exampleHindi: कंपनी के पुनर्गठन के दौरान पूरी टीम नए प्रबंधक के इर्द-गिर्द लामबंद हो गई।

meaning: To gather or mobilize people together to support a particular decision, policy, or action.
definition: To gather or mobilize people together to support a particular decision, policy, or action.
example: The project sponsor met with different directors to rally support for the database upgrade.
exampleHindi: प्रोजेक्ट प्रायोजक ने डेटाबेस अपग्रेड के लिए समर्थन जुटाने के लिए विभिन्न निदेशकों से मुलाकात की।

meaning: To show an idea, draft, or proposal to someone in authority to get their opinion or approval.
definition: To show an idea, draft, or proposal to someone in authority to get their opinion or approval.
example: I will run the draft of the contract by the legal team before sending it to you.
exampleHindi: आपको भेजने से पहले मैं अनुबंध का मसौदा कानूनी टीम से जांचवाऊंगा।

meaning: A common picture or understanding of a desired future state that a group of people is committed to achieving.
definition: A common picture or understanding of a desired future state that a group of people is committed to achieving.
example: Having a shared vision inspired the startup team to work long hours to build their app.
exampleHindi: एक साझा दृष्टिकोण होने से स्टार्टअप टीम को अपना ऐप बनाने के लिए लंबे समय तक काम करने की प्रेरणा मिली।

word: SING FROM THE SAME HYMN SHEET
meaning: To express the same opinions or say the same things in public to show unity and agreement.
pronunciation: सींग फ्रॉम थे शामे ह्यमन शीट
definition: To express the same opinions or say the same things in public to show unity and agreement.
example: It is crucial that we all sing from the same hymn sheet when we present to the investors.
exampleHindi: यह महत्वपूर्ण है कि जब हम निवेशकों के सामने प्रस्तुति दें तो हम सभी एक ही भजन गाएं।

meaning: A trusted person or group whose reactions to an idea are used to test its quality or viability.
definition: A trusted person or group whose reactions to an idea are used to test its quality or viability.
example: My supervisor acted as a helpful sounding board for my new marketing ideas.
exampleHindi: मेरे पर्यवेक्षक ने मेरे नए मार्केटिंग विचारों के लिए एक सहायक साउंडिंग बोर्ड के रूप में काम किया।

meaning: The process of bringing a company's goals, departments, and activities into agreement with its overall strategy.
definition: The process of making sure a company's goals, resources, and teams are all working together toward the same long-term objective.
example: Restructuring the sales team helped achieve strategic alignment with our focus on enterprise clients.
exampleHindi: बिक्री टीम के पुनर्गठन से उद्यम ग्राहकों पर हमारे फोकस के साथ रणनीतिक संरेखण हासिल करने में मदद मिली।

meaning: The extra energy, efficiency, or success achieved when two or more people or groups work together.
definition: The interaction or cooperation of two or more organizations, substances, or other agents to produce a combined effect greater than the sum of their separate effects.
example: There is a great synergy between our design team and the marketing department.
exampleHindi: हमारी डिज़ाइन टीम और मार्केटिंग विभाग के बीच बहुत अच्छा तालमेल है।

meaning: To briefly contact or meet with someone to talk about progress, updates, or plans.
definition: Briefly make or renew contact with someone.
example: Let's touch base next Monday to see if we have received the client feedback.
exampleHindi: आइए अगले सोमवार को आधार पर संपर्क करें और देखें कि क्या हमें ग्राहकों की प्रतिक्रिया प्राप्त हुई है।

meaning: Fully agreed upon or supported by everyone involved; without any opposition.
definition: Fully agreed upon or supported by everyone involved; without any opposition.
example: The board's vote to approve the budget was unanimous.
exampleHindi: बजट को मंजूरी देने के लिए बोर्ड का वोट सर्वसम्मति से हुआ।

meaning: A clear statement of the unique value, benefits, or solutions that a product or idea offers.
definition: An innovation, service, or feature intended to make a company or product attractive to customers.
example: Our value proposition is simple: we provide faster service at a lower cost than our competitors.
exampleHindi: हमारा मूल्य प्रस्ताव सरल है: हम अपने प्रतिस्पर्धियों की तुलना में कम लागत पर तेज़ सेवा प्रदान करते हैं।

meaning: To support your words, promises, or beliefs with actual actions; doing what you say you will do.
definition: To support your words, promises, or beliefs with actual actions; doing what you say you will do.
example: The management claims to value employee wellness, and they walk the talk by offering flexible hours.
exampleHindi: प्रबंधन कर्मचारियों के कल्याण को महत्व देने का दावा करता है, और वे लचीले घंटों की पेशकश करके बात को आगे बढ़ाते हैं।
